ops.text: plan-trip.js walker run wf_09473e2b-85f: rank runner agents got exit 3 (state conflict) twice in a row immediately after assess stamped, so rank/finalize surfaced as failed — yet the identical `getaway rank <slug>` at the main level minutes later exited 0 and stamped clean, and finalize followed. Looks like a transient state conflict window right after an artifact write (assess.json.lock/expand.json.lock present), not a real rank failure; the walker's retry-once happened inside the same window. Worth checking what rank's exit-3 path actually checks and whether the walker should back off before retrying a state-conflict exit.
